risk_title: Project Implementation Suspension Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) financing for the project has been canceled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) [and any other trust funds] in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Persistent High Political and Governance Risk
risk_summary: Political and governance risk remains rated as High across all assessment periods (approval, last approved rating, and proposed rating), indicating sustained fragility in the operating environment.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance lHigh lHigh lHigh

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk is rated as High across all assessment periods, creating sustained uncertainty for project implementation and sustainability in Afghanistan.

Despite a grievance mechanism being in place, there is no evidence that project-related grievances are being resolved, with 0% of grievances addressed within one month as of the last reporting period, indicating breakdown in stakeholder engagement mechanisms.
evidence_quote: While a grievance mechanisms is in place and grievances are being logged, there is no evidence that they are being resolved.
